title: Risk
description: A modernization risk surfaced by the modernization plugin's risk-discovery skill. Blocks Construction->Operations stage transitions when gate_ref is open.

mitigation.description: Planned mitigation. Required before the risk can be marked 'accepted'.

gate_ref.description: Quality gate this risk blocks. Open gates prevent stage transitions under stage-gate-strict mode.

owner.description: Human or team accountable for mitigation.

owasp_llm_top10_id.description: Optional OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications category this risk maps to.

nist_ai_rmf_subcategory.description: Optional NIST AI RMF (AI 100-1) subcategory id, e.g. 'GOVERN.1.1' or 'MEASURE.2.6'.

compliance_refs.description: Optional compliance framework controls this risk maps to. Multiple frameworks permitted.

deployment_refs.description: Optional Deployment.id values this risk applies to (inverse of Deployment.risk_exceptions).
